records.question: Which people have been in the program exactly as Year_2, are at most student 1, have no position, and whose phase is exactly Post_Quals?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.p_id FROM person
JOIN taughtby ON person.p_id = taughtby.p_id
WHERE person.student <= 1 AND person.yearsinprogram = 'Year_2' AND person.inphase = 'Post_Quals' AND person.hasposition = '0'
records.pred_sql: SELECT p_id FROM person WHERE yearsInProgram = 'Year_2' AND student <= 1 AND hasPosition = 'no position' AND inPhase = 'Post_Quals'

records.question: Who are the Faculty members with inphase exactly 0 and yearsinprogram exactly 0, who are professors exactly 1 and not students, teaching Level_300 courses?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.p_id FROM person
JOIN taughtby ON person.p_id = taughtby.p_id
JOIN course ON taughtby.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE person.hasposition = 'Faculty' AND person.inphase = '0' AND person.yearsinprogram = '0' AND course.courselevel = 'Level_300' AND person.professor = 1 AND person.student = 0
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.p_id FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN taughtBy AS T2 ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id INNER JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.course_id = T3.course_id WHERE T1.inPhase = '0' AND T1.yearsInProgram = '0' AND T1.professor = 1 AND T1.student = 0 AND T3.courseLevel = 'Level_300'

WHERE person.professor <= 1 AND person.student = 0 AND person.hasposition = 'Faculty_eme' AND person.inphase = '0' AND course.courselevel = 'Level_400' AND person.yearsinprogram = '0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.p_id
FROM person AS T1
LEFT JOIN advisedBy AS T2
  ON T1.p_id = T2.p_id
LEFT JOIN person AS T3
  ON T2.p_id_dummy = T3.p_id AND T3.professor = 1
JOIN taughtBy AS T4
  ON T1.p_id = T4.p_id
JOIN course AS T5
  ON T4.course_id = T5.course_id
WHERE
  T1.student = 0 AND T1.hasPosition = 'Faculty_eme' AND T1.inPhase = '0' AND T1.yearsInProgram = '0' AND T5.courseLevel = 'Level_400'
GROUP BY
  T1.p_id
HAVING
  COUNT(DISTINCT T3.p_id) <= 1

records.question: Which faculty-affiliated people are not students, have been in the program for exactly 0 years, are not inphase, and have a professor level of at most 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.p_id FROM person
JOIN taughtby ON person.p_id = taughtby.p_id
WHERE person.inphase = '0' AND person.yearsinprogram = '0' AND person.professor <= 1 AND person.hasposition = 'Faculty_aff' AND person.student = 0
records.pred_sql: SELECT p_id FROM person WHERE hasPosition = 'Faculty' AND student = 0 AND yearsInProgram = '0' AND inPhase = 'No' AND professor <= 1
